channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Monthly / Decision makers
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Decision makers (Monthly, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly #2 — March 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: This month, GitHub Copilot crossed a significant threshold: from AI assistant to autonomous development platform. The cloud agent can now research codebases, generate implementation plans, and write code independently before any pull request is opened. Simultaneously, three new organization-level governance controls give enterprises the guardrails to deploy that autonomy at scale.

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly #1 — March 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: GitHub Copilot is evolving from a coding assistant into a full agentic platform. This month saw GPT-5.4 go GA, agentic capabilities reach general availability across major IDEs, a new SDK for embedding Copilot into custom applications, and 60 million code reviews — underscoring the scale at which AI is reshaping how software gets built, reviewed, and shipped.
